description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a prominent scope mounted on top, suggesting it is optimized for precision shooting. The body is primarily composed of matte black metal with some red accents, and it includes a skeletonized stock with ergonomic cutouts for weight reduction and improved handling. The barrel is long and fitted with a multi-port muzzle brake, enhancing stability and reducing recoil. The magazine appears to be a detachable box type, integrated seamlessly into the lower receiver. The rifle also includes a pistol grip and a cheek rest, both designed for user comfort and control. The overall construction and finish indicate a high-quality, durable firearm suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, black tactical rifle with a scope, skeletonized stock, long barrel, and red accent details. Features include a muzzle brake, detachable box magazine, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the scope, skeletonized stock, long barrel with muzzle brake, and red accent details.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle brake, barrel alignment, and the narrow profile of the scope and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the scope, stock cutouts, and the overall streamlined design of the rifle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the cheek rest, pistol grip, and the alignment of the scope with the stock.
